mapper.select: SELECT seller_id as "id", business_name as "businessName", store_name as "storeName", business_type as "businessType", contact_email as "contactEmail", contact_phone as "contactPhone", city as "city", state as "state", gstin as "gstin", gst_verified as "gstVerified", pan_verified as "panVerified", bank_account_verified as "bankAccountVerified", tier as "tier", commission_rate as "commissionRate", rating as "rating", health_score as "healthScore", fulfillment_rate as "fulfillmentRate", dispatch_sla_pct as "dispatchSlaPct", delivery_sla_pct as "deliverySlaPct", return_rate as "returnRate", response_time_hours as "responseTimeHours", cancellation_rate as "cancellationRate", violations_count as "violationsCount", total_products as "totalProducts", active_listings as "activeListings", gmv_30d as "gmv30d", orders_30d as "orders30d", revenue_30d as "revenue30d", pending_payout as "pendingPayout", last_payout_date as "lastPayoutDate", last_payout_amount as "lastPayoutAmount", payout_frequency as "payoutFrequency", avg_lead_time_days as "avgLeadTimeDays", seller_status as "stateId", active_date as "activeDate" FROM hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat WHERE seller_id = #{id}
SELECT seller_status as "stateId", count(*) as "totalOrders" FROM hm_query.dim_seller GROUP BY seller_status

SELECT seller_key as "id", business_name as "businessName", business_type as "businessType", contact_email as "contactEmail", seller_status as "stateId", active_date as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.dim_seller WHERE seller_status IN ('APPLIED', 'UNDER_REVIEW') ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.dim_seller WHERE seller_status IN ('APPLIED', 'UNDER_REVIEW')

SELECT seller_key as "id", business_name as "businessName", rating as "rating", fulfillment_rate as "fulfillmentRate", total_products as "totalOrders", health_score as "healthScore", seller_status as "stateId" FROM hm_query.dim_seller WHERE seller_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY rating DESC, fulfillment_rate DESC ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.dim_seller WHERE seller_status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT seller_key as "id", business_name as "businessName", rating as "rating", fulfillment_rate as "fulfillmentRate", total_products as "totalOrders", return_rate as "returnRate", health_score as "healthScore", seller_status as "stateId" FROM hm_query.dim_seller WHERE (rating < 200 OR fulfillment_rate < 8500) AND seller_status IN ('ACTIVE', 'ON_PROBATION') ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.dim_seller WHERE (rating < 200 OR fulfillment_rate < 8500) AND seller_status IN ('ACTIVE', 'ON_PROBATION')

SELECT seller_id as "id", business_name as "businessName", store_name as "storeName", business_type as "businessType", contact_email as "contactEmail", contact_phone as "contactPhone", city as "city", state as "state", tier as "tier", commission_rate as "commissionRate", rating as "rating", health_score as "healthScore", fulfillment_rate as "fulfillmentRate", total_products as "totalProducts", active_listings as "activeListings", gmv_30d as "gmv30d", orders_30d as "orders30d", pending_payout as "pendingPayout", seller_status as "stateId", active_date as "activeDate" FROM hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT seller_id as "id", business_name as "businessName", rating as "rating", health_score as "healthScore", fulfillment_rate as "fulfillmentRate", dispatch_sla_pct as "dispatchSlaPct", return_rate as "returnRate", response_time_hours as "responseTimeHours", cancellation_rate as "cancellationRate", violations_count as "violationsCount", avg_lead_time_days as "avgLeadTimeDays", gmv_30d as "gmv30d", orders_30d as "orders30d", revenue_30d as "revenue30d" FROM hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat WHERE seller_id = #{id}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat WHERE seller_id = #{id}
